title: Lead Revenue Manager at Aman Resorts India

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Aman Resorts India
jsonLd.description:
We at Aman Resorts India are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Kanpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Aman Resorts India:
Aman Resorts India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aman Resorts India!
